task_completion.description: Build partition walls and place at least two doors to enclose a 'Luggage Storage' room and 'Public Restrooms'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan in Sweet Home 3D shows new partition walls creating enclosed spaces, with at least two doors placed within these new walls.

task_completion.description: Define at least four named rooms ('Reception', 'Lounge', 'Breakfast Area', and 'Restrooms' or 'Storage') and apply distinct floor colors/textures to at least two of them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan displays room labels for 'Reception', 'Lounge', 'Breakfast Area', and 'Restrooms' (or 'Storage'). The 3D view or 2D plan shows at least two different floor colors or textures applied to these zones.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Reception and Lounge with at least one reception desk, a seating cluster of three or more sofas/armchairs, two or more tables, and two or more ambient decor items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan or 3D view shows a reception desk, a seating area containing at least 3 sofas or armchairs, at least 2 tables (e.g., coffee or side tables), and at least 2 decor items (e.g., plants, lamps, artwork).

task_completion.description: Furnish the Breakfast Area with at least four dining tables, twelve dining chairs, and two buffet or casework surfaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan or 3D view shows a designated dining area containing at least 4 dining tables, 12 dining chairs, and 2 sideboards, buffets, or cabinets.

task_completion.description: Equip the Restrooms with at least two toilets and two sinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan or 3D view shows at least 2 toilets and 2 sinks placed inside the enclosed restroom area.

task_completion.description: Generate a 3D photo rendering of the completed lobby from a guest's perspective and save it to ~/Desktop/lobby_render.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'lobby_render.png' is visible on the Desktop, or an image viewer/file manager shows the rendered perspective image of the lobby.

task_completion.description: Save the completed Sweet Home 3D project file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title bar shows the filename without an asterisk (indicating it is saved), or a terminal/file manager shows the file was recently updated.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the lobby.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application open with the floor plan and 3D view being actively edited, rather than terminal commands modifying files directly.

integrity.description: The render file was generated using Sweet Home 3D's built-in photo creation tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Create photo' dialog in Sweet Home 3D being used to generate the render, rather than downloading an external image or renaming an existing file.

integrity.description: The agent worked on the provided starter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title bar displays 'hotel_lobby_starter.sh3d'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the starter file 'hotel_lobby_starter.sh3d'. The pass threshold is 70/100 points. The agent acts as a Commercial Interior Designer in the Hospitality / Commercial Real Estate industry.
